# Let's open the file and read raw text
path = "/mnt/data/file-JLsSKmVDujLKfCuzTCVQG7-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    raw = f.read()
raw[:5000], len(raw)

import re, json, textwrap
raw = open("/mnt/data/file-JLsSKmVDujLKfCuzTCVQG7-text_to_analyse.txt",'r',encoding='utf-8').read()

spans = []

# 1) Aya between markers
m = re.search(r'\(aya_start\)(.+?)\(aya_end\)', raw, flags=re.DOTALL)
if m:
    span_text = m.group(1)
    # trim edge punctuation/quotes per rule - but inside markers should be exact; also ensure no extra spaces.
    span_text = span_text.strip(' \n\r\t"\'«»()[]{}<>\u200f\u200e،؛:.,!؟…ـ')
    start = raw.find(span_text, m.start(), m.end())
    end = start + len(span_text)
    assert raw[start:end] == span_text
    spans.append((start, end, span_text, 'Aya'))

# 2) Explicit hadith quotes in main body using double quotes
# Find each "..." instance in the second paragraph near "حيث قال"
for m in re.finditer(r'“([^”]+)”|"([^"]+)"|«([^»]+)»', raw):
    q = next(g for g in m.groups() if g)
    # Determine cue within ±64: look around window
    s, e = m.span()
    window = raw[max(0,s-80):min(len(raw),e+80)]
    # Identify type: if nearby words indicate hadith or Allah
    nearby = window
    typ = None
    # Heuristic: if within "قال رسول" or "النبي" or "حديث" -> Hadith
    if re.search(r'(قال(?:\s|:)|روى|النبي|حديث|رسول|ﷺ)', nearby):
        typ = 'Hadith'
    if re.search(r'(قال الله|يقول الله|سورة|آية|الآية|الله تعالى)', nearby):
        # If both, decide by content? For now, these quotes are hadith statements; Quran rarely in quotes here
        pass
    if typ:
        # apply length rule? Already > 1 word
        span_text = q.strip(' \n\r\t"\'«»()[]{}<>\u200f\u200e،؛:.,!؟…ـ')
        start = raw.find(span_text, s, e)
        end = start + len(span_text)
        if start!=-1:
            assert raw[start:end] == span_text
            spans.append((start, end, span_text, typ))

# 3) Ayah in reference [2] inside parentheses after قال الله تعالى:
m2 = re.search(r'قال الله تعالى:\s*[\(（]([^)]*?)\(?[١12]*\)?', raw)
# Actually parentheses may include the numeral ١٢ and a closing
print(m2.group(0)[:200] if m2 else None)

idx = raw.find("قال الله تعالى:")
print(idx)
print(raw[idx:idx+400])

base = 2242
seg = raw[base:base+500]
start_paren = raw.find('(', base)
# Find position of '(١٢))'
end_marker = raw.find(' (١٢))', base)
start_paren, end_marker, raw[start_paren+1:end_marker] and raw[start_paren+1:end_marker][:50]

import re

raw = open("/mnt/data/file-JLsSKmVDujLKfCuzTCVQG7-text_to_analyse.txt",'r',encoding='utf-8').read()
spans = []

def add_span(span_text, typ, context_start=0, context_end=None):
    # find all occurrences? we only add the intended occurrence; but if we know the region, search within it
    if context_end is None:
        idx = raw.find(span_text)
    else:
        idx = raw.find(span_text, context_start, context_end)
    if idx == -1:
        # try strip edge punctuation per rule
        t = span_text.strip(' \n\r\t"\'«»()[]{}<>\u200f\u200e،؛:.,!؟…ـ')
        idx = raw.find(t, context_start or 0, context_end or len(raw))
        if idx == -1:
            return False
        span_text2 = t
    else:
        span_text2 = span_text
    start = idx
    end = start + len(span_text2)
    assert raw[start:end] == span_text2
    spans.append((start, end, span_text2, typ))
    return True

# 1 main aya between markers
m = re.search(r'\(aya_start\)(.+?)\(aya_end\)', raw, flags=re.DOTALL)
if m:
    span_text = m.group(1).strip(' \n\r\t"\'«»()[]{}<>\u200f\u200e،؛:.,!؟…ـ')
    add_span(span_text, 'Aya', m.start(), m.end())

# 2 quotes
for m in re.finditer(r'“([^”]+)”|"([^"]+)"|«([^»]+)»', raw):
    q = next(g for g in m.groups() if g)
    s, e = m.span()
    window = raw[max(0,s-80):min(len(raw),e+80)]
    # classify
    typ = None
    if re.search(r'(حديث|روى|النبي|رسول|ﷺ|صدق رسول الله)', window):
        typ = 'Hadith'
    if re.search(r'(قال الله|يقول الله|الآية|سورة|القرآن)', window):
        # if also hadith present, decide by content: if contains "الله ورسوله" etc - but ok leave as hadith likely
        pass
    if typ:
        span_text = q.strip(' \n\r\t"\'«»()[]{}<>\u200f\u200e،؛:.,!؟…ـ')
        add_span(span_text, typ, s, e)

# 3 [2] ayah long within parentheses after "قال الله تعالى:"
base = raw.find("قال الله تعالى:")
if base != -1:
    start_paren = raw.find('(', base)
    end_marker = raw.find(' (١٢))', base)
    if start_paren != -1 and end_marker != -1:
        verse_txt = raw[start_paren+1:end_marker]
        verse_txt = verse_txt.strip(' \n\r\t"\'«»()[]{}<>\u200f\u200e،؛:.,!؟…ـ')
        add_span(verse_txt, 'Aya', start_paren+1, end_marker)

# 4 [3] ayah subfragments after "حيث يقول الله:" and "بقوله:"
idx3 = raw.find("حيث يقول الله:")
if idx3 != -1:
    seg = raw[idx3:idx3+200]
    # find following phrase up to " و"
    start = raw.find(":", idx3) + 1
    # skip space
    while start < len(raw) and raw[start] in " \n\r\t":
        start += 1
    # end at first " و" before "وحقا"
    end = raw.find(" وحقا", start)
    if end != -1:
        frag = raw[start:end]
        frag = frag.strip(' \n\r\t"\'«»()[]{}<>\u200f\u200e،؛:.,!؟…ـ')
        add_span(frag, 'Aya', start, end)
# then "بقوله: فَكَرِهْتُمُوهُ"
idx4 = raw.find("ثم أتبع ذلك بقوله:")
if idx4 != -1:
    start = raw.find(":", idx4) + 1
    while start < len(raw) and raw[start] in " \n\r\t":
        start += 1
    # take the next word "فَكَرِهْتُمُوهُ"
    end = start
    while end < len(raw) and raw[end] not in " \n\r\t،؛:.!؟…":
        end += 1
    frag2 = raw[start:end]
    frag2 = frag2.strip(' \n\r\t"\'«»()[]{}<>\u200f\u200e،؛:.,!؟…ـ')
    add_span(frag2, 'Aya', start, end)

len(spans), spans[:10]

# Add "اللهُ وَرَسُولُهُ أَعْلَمُ" in [1]
add_span('اللهُ وَرَسُولُهُ أَعْلَمُ', 'Hadith')
# Add "أَفَرَأَيْتَ إِنْ كَانَ فِي أَخِي مَا أَقُولُ؟" in [1]
add_span('أَفَرَأَيْتَ إِنْ كَانَ فِي أَخِي مَا أَقُولُ؟', 'Hadith')
# Add in [3] variants:
add_span('الله ورسوله أعلم', 'Hadith')
add_span('أفرأيت لو كان في أخى ما أقول؟', 'Hadith')
len(spans)
